untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of consolidation pattern formation near 12-month low/center/high, which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. Donchian channels approximate breakout detection but do not identify consolidation zones or 12-month reference levels. Pattern recognition (consolidation detection) is not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Used dc_upper as a proxy for upward breakout detection from a consolidation range. Exit condition uses sma_20 crossbelow as a reasonable reversal signal given the author-silent exit guidance. Parameters show strong average gains (32-38% over 12-30 days) suggesting a 30-day hold period and tight 2% stop-loss. The core pattern recognition requirement (consolidation near 12-month extremes) cannot be fully translated.
